name: WhatsApp Router
description: Receive and send WhatsApp messages via the WhatsApp Router service.

routerUrl.description: Base URL of the WhatsApp Router service (e.g. http://whatsapp-router:3000)

routerSecret.description: Shared secret — must match ROUTER_SECRET in the router service

tenantId.description: This OpenClaw instance's tenant ID registered in the router

allowFrom.description: E.164 phone numbers (without +) allowed to message this bot
